creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text: While it would be great to have a logstash7 port, I don't see that as a barrier to committing elasticsearch7 and kibana7.  There are a lot of things you can do with ElasticSearch and Kibana without LogStash.  Most of the commercial work I've been (peripherally) involved with has fallen into this category.  So personally I don't think we should hold up committing the port for that.
